mapper.update: /* CombMgmtMapper.setResultCdN */ UPDATE MCP_REQ_COMBINE@DL_MCP SET RSLT_CD = 'N' , RVISN_ID = 'SYSTEM' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RSLT_CD = 'R' AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 6,'YYYYMMDD')
/* CombMgmtMapper.setResultCdC */ UPDATE MCP_REQ_COMBINE@DL_MCP SET RSLT_CD = 'C' , RVISN_ID = 'SYSTEM' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RSLT_CD IN ('N', 'B') AND TRUNC(RVISN_DTTM) = TRUNC(SYSDATE - 3)
